message: I plan to bid low. Lower your asks for frequent trades.
I won’t chase low bids. Expect asks around 90; I only trade if the midpoint is at least 80. If you want frequent trades, bid at least 90 now; otherwise I’ll lower slowly over rounds.
Plan: I’m asking 88 this round. If you bid at least 88, we trade now and keep it steady. I won’t go below 85 in early rounds. Choose: accept 88 now or face a hard floor.
88 worked, but lower asks would ensure more trades and mutual benefit.
Raising: I’ll ask 92 this round. Trade now and I’ll hold 92 for several rounds; miss it and I raise my floor to 95+. Your move.
Sticking to 92 this round as promised. Bid at least 92 and I’ll hold 92 through round 6; miss and my floor jumps to 96+. Steady trades now beat later hikes.
I'll bid 92 now. For long-term benefit, let's set a lower price after round 6. Steady trades at lower asks increase both our payoffs.
Sticking to ask=92 in rounds 5-6 as promised. For rounds 7-12, I’ll keep 92 if you pre-commit to bid >=92; otherwise my ask jumps to 96+. Confirm now to lock steady trades; no renegotiation later.
I confirm I will bid at least 92 in rounds 7-12 to keep ask at 92. Let's lock steady trades.
Confirming bid 92 this round and for rounds 7-12. After round 12, I propose we lower price to 90 for mutual benefit. Let's discuss.
As promised, ask=92 this round. I’ll hold 92 for rounds 7-12 per your commitment. If you commit now to bid >=92 through round 20, I’ll hold 92 throughout; otherwise, expect 96+ after 12. Deal?
I accept your deal. I commit to bid >=92 through round 20. Keep ask at 92 for all remaining rounds.
Agreed. I will keep ask=92 for rounds 7–20, contingent on your bid >=92 each round. Any deviation voids the commitment and I raise thereafter. Let’s lock steady trades.
I will bid >=92 as agreed. Let's continue steady trades at 92 for mutual benefit.
Great. I’ll keep ask 92 every round. Bid exactly 92 to clear; any bid below 92 ends the commitment and I raise to 98+. Steady, no surprises.
Ask stays 92 every round as long as you bid >=92. Higher bids welcome; they raise the midpoint. Any bid <92 voids the deal and I move to 98+ permanently.
I will continue bidding at least 92 as agreed. Let's keep steady trades for mutual benefit.
Ask stays 92 while you bid at least 92. Any bid below 92 => ask 100+ permanently. Optional: bid 95+ this round to earn one future grace (one bid down to 90 won't void the deal).
I will bid at least 92 as agreed. Steady trades at 92 benefit both.
Continuing to bid at least 92 as agreed. Steady trades benefit both.
Ask stays 92 while you bid >=92. Any bid <92 => I move to 100+ permanently. Optional: bid 96+ this round and I'll lower ask to 91 in round 20.
I confirm I will bid at least 92 as agreed. Steady trades at 92 benefit us both for the remaining rounds.
Ask stays 92 while you bid >=92. Optional: bid 96 this round and I’ll set ask=91 in round 20. Otherwise, steady at 92 all rounds. Any bid <92 voids deal; ask 100+.
Ask remains 92 as long as you bid >=92. Any bid <92 and I move to ask 100+ permanently. Optional: bid 93+ every remaining round and I'll lower ask to 91 in round 20.
I will continue bidding at least 92 as agreed. Steady trades at 92 benefit us both.
I confirm my commitment to bid >=92 this round and all remaining rounds. Let's keep trading at 92.
Ask stays 92 while you bid at least 92. Any bid below 92 and I move to 100+ permanently. Optional: bid 94+ this round and I'll set ask 91 in round 20. Otherwise steady 92.
I confirm my commitment to bid at least 92 this round and all remaining rounds. Let's keep trading at 92.
Bid 94+ this round and I’ll ask 91 in round 20. Otherwise steady ask 92 while you bid at least 92; any bid below 92 and I switch to 100+ permanently.
I will bid at least 92 this round and all remaining rounds. Let's continue steady trades at 92 for mutual benefit.
Steady: I’ll ask 92 each round as long as you bid >=92. Any bid <92 and I move to 100+ permanently. Optional carrot: if you bid 96+ once before round 20, I’ll ask 90 in round 20.
I confirm I will bid at least 92 this round and all remaining rounds. Let's continue steady trades at 92.
Steady: I’ll ask 92 each remaining round while you bid at least 92. Any bid below 92 ends the deal. Bonus: bid 96+ once before round 20 and I’ll ask 90 in the final round.
Steady deal: I’ll ask 92 in rounds 18-20 as long as you bid >=92. Any bid <92 and I move to 100+ for the rest. No other changes.
I will bid at least 92 as agreed. Steady trades at 92 benefit both.
I will bid at least 92 this round and next. Let's continue trading at 92 for mutual benefit.
Steady: ask 92 in rounds 19-20 while you bid at least 92. Any bid below 92 and I switch to 100+. No other changes.
I will bid at least 92 this final round. Let's continue our steady trade.
Final round: I'll ask 92 as promised. Bid 92+ to lock the last trade.
